title: Browser Profiles
description: Manage browser profiles for web automation. Each profile has its own browser instance, isolation mode, and domain routing.

empty.title: No browser profiles
empty.description: Add a browser profile to enable web automation.

dialog.description: Configure a browser profile for web automation.
dialog.name: Profile Name
dialog.remoteUrlHint: WebSocket URL for remote browser (e.g. ws://cloak:9222). Leave empty for local Chrome.
dialog.sharedHint: Skip tenant isolation — preserves cookies from manual login.
dialog.domainsHint: Comma-separated. Auto-route URLs matching these domains (e.g. shopee.*, *.shopee.*).
dialog.vncUrlHint: noVNC URL for manual login (e.g. http://host:6080).

toast.saved: Browser profiles saved. Restart may be required.
